sections.newsroom: Accenture Reports Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year Fiscal 2025 Results September 25, 2025 Accenture Reports Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year Fiscal 2025 Results Accenture’s fiscal 2025 revenues, adjusted EPS and free cash flow come in ahead of Company’s expectations; Early AI investments help drive strong fiscal 2025 results NEW YORK; Sept. 25, 2025 — Accenture (NYSE: ACN) reported financial results for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year ended August 31, 2025.
